testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_157] Ensure that RDS instances have Multi-AZ enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_211] Ensure RDS uses a modern CaCert
[NONE][CKV_AWS_388] Ensure AWS Aurora PostgreSQL is not exposed to local file read vulnerability
[NONE][CKV_AWS_17] Ensure all data stored in RDS is not publicly accessible
[NONE][CKV_AWS_16] Ensure all data stored in the RDS is securely encrypted at rest
[NONE][CKV_AWS_250] Ensure that RDS PostgreSQL instances use a non vulnerable version with the log_fdw extension (https://aws.amazon.com/security/security-bulletins/AWS-2022-004/)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_354] Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs
[NONE][CKV_AWS_133] Ensure that RDS instances has backup policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_322] Ensure ElastiCache for Redis cache clusters have auto minor version upgrades enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_323] Ensure ElastiCache clusters do not use the default subnet group
[NONE][CKV_AWS_93] Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_56] Ensure S3 bucket has 'restrict_public_buckets' enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_55] Ensure S3 bucket has ignore public ACLs enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_53] Ensure S3 bucket has block public ACLS enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_54] Ensure S3 bucket has block public policy enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_163] Ensure ECR image scanning on push is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_65] Ensure container insights are enabled on ECS cluster
[NONE][CKV_AWS_223] Ensure ECS Cluster enables logging of ECS Exec
[NONE][CKV_AWS_328] Ensure that ALB is configured with defensive or strictest desync mitigation mode
[NONE][CKV_AWS_261] Ensure HTTP HTTPS Target group defines Healthcheck
[NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year
[NONE][CKV_AWS_66] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group specifies retention days
[NONE][CKV_AWS_97] Ensure Encryption in transit is enabled for EFS volumes in ECS Task definitions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_336] Ensure ECS containers are limited to read-only access to root filesystems
[NONE][CKV_AWS_249] Ensure that the Execution Role ARN and the Task Role ARN are different in ECS Task definitions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_332] Ensure ECS Fargate services run on the latest Fargate platform version
[NONE][CKV_AWS_333] Ensure ECS services do not have public IP addresses assigned to them automatically
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_287] Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
[NONE][CKV_AWS_62] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_289] Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management / resource exposure without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_286] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
[NONE][CKV_AWS_63] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions

failure.message: Ensure RDS database has IAM authentication enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_db_instance.postgresql File: /data.tf: 12-31 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/ensure-rds-database-has-iam-authentication-enabled
12 | resource "aws_db_instance" "postgresql" { 13 | identifier = "${var.project_name}-postgresql" 14 | engine = "postgres" 15 | engine_version = "15.7" 16 | instance_class = "db.t3.micro" 17 | allocated_storage = 20 18 | storage_type = "gp2" 19 | storage_encrypted = true 20 | db_name = var.db_name 21 | username = var.db_username 22 | password = var.db_password 23 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.rds.name 24 | vpc_security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.rds.id] 25 | backup_retention_period = 1 26 | skip_final_snapshot = true 27 | deletion_protection = false 28 | multi_az = true 29 | copy_tags_to_snapshot = true 30 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-postgresql" } 31 | }

Resource: aws_elasticache_cluster.redis File: /data.tf: 39-50 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-amazon-elasticache-redis-clusters-have-automatic-backup-turned-on
39 | resource "aws_elasticache_cluster" "redis" { 40 | cluster_id = "${var.project_name}-redis" 41 | engine = "redis" 42 | node_type = "cache.t3.micro" 43 | num_cache_nodes = 1 44 | parameter_group_name = "default.redis7" 45 | engine_version = "7.0" 46 | port = 6379 47 | subnet_group_name = aws_elasticache_subnet_group.redis.name 48 | security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.redis.id] 49 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-redis-cache" } 50 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_iam_role_policy.ecs_execution_secrets File: /iam.tf: 23-34 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-355
23 | resource "aws_iam_role_policy" "ecs_execution_secrets" { 24 | name = "${var.project_name}-ecs-execution-secrets" 25 | role = aws_iam_role.ecs_execution_role.id 26 | policy = jsonencode({ 27 | Version = "2012-10-17" 28 | Statement = [{ 29 | Effect = "Allow" 30 | Action = ["secretsmanager:GetSecretValue", "ssm:GetParameters"] 31 | Resource = "*" 32 | }] 33 | }) 34 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_288] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration

failure.message: Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration

Resource: aws_iam_role_policy.ecs_execution_secrets File: /iam.tf: 23-34 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-288
23 | resource "aws_iam_role_policy" "ecs_execution_secrets" { 24 | name = "${var.project_name}-ecs-execution-secrets" 25 | role = aws_iam_role.ecs_execution_role.id 26 | policy = jsonencode({ 27 | Version = "2012-10-17" 28 | Statement = [{ 29 | Effect = "Allow" 30 | Action = ["secretsmanager:GetSecretValue", "ssm:GetParameters"] 31 | Resource = "*" 32 | }] 33 | }) 34 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_355] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

failure.message: Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_iam_role_policy.ecs_task_permissions File: /iam.tf: 49-87 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-355
49 | resource "aws_iam_role_policy" "ecs_task_permissions" { 50 | name = "${var.project_name}-ecs-task-permissions" 51 | role = aws_iam_role.ecs_task_role.id 52 | policy = jsonencode({ 53 | Version = "2012-10-17" 54 | Statement = [ 55 | { 56 | Sid = "SQSAccess" 57 | Effect = "Allow" 58 | Action = ["sqs:SendMessage","sqs:ReceiveMessage","sqs:DeleteMessage","sqs:GetQueueAttributes"] 59 | Resource = "*" 60 | }, 61 | { 62 | Sid = "S3ReportesAccess" 63 | Effect = "Allow" 64 | Action = ["s3:PutObject","s3:GetObject","s3:DeleteObject"] 65 | Resource = "arn:aws:s3:::${var.project_name}-reportes-*/*" 66 | }, 67 | { 68 | Sid = "DynamoDBAccess" 69 | Effect = "Allow" 70 | Action = ["dynamodb:PutItem","dynamodb:GetItem","dynamodb:UpdateItem","dynamodb:Query","dynamodb:Scan"] 71 | Resource = "arn:aws:dynamodb:*:*:table/${var.project_name}-*" 72 | }, 73 | { 74 | Sid = "SNSPublish" 75 | Effect = "Allow" 76 | Action = ["sns:Publish"] 77 | Resource = "*" 78 | }, 79 | { 80 | Sid = "SecretsAccess" 81 | Effect = "Allow" 82 | Action = ["secretsmanager:GetSecretValue"] 83 | Resource = "arn:aws:secretsmanager:*:*:secret:${var.project_name}/*" 84 | } 85 | ] 86 | }) 87 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_db_instance.postgresql File: /data.tf: 12-31 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-postgres-rds-has-query-logging-enabled
12 | resource "aws_db_instance" "postgresql" { 13 | identifier = "${var.project_name}-postgresql" 14 | engine = "postgres" 15 | engine_version = "15.7" 16 | instance_class = "db.t3.micro" 17 | allocated_storage = 20 18 | storage_type = "gp2" 19 | storage_encrypted = true 20 | db_name = var.db_name 21 | username = var.db_username 22 | password = var.db_password 23 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.rds.name 24 | vpc_security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.rds.id] 25 | backup_retention_period = 1 26 | skip_final_snapshot = true 27 | deletion_protection = false 28 | multi_az = true 29 | copy_tags_to_snapshot = true 30 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-postgresql" } 31 | }

failure.message: Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

failure.message: Ensure AWS Load Balancer doesn't use HTTP protocol

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lb_target_group.ecs File: /ecs.tf: 31-46 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/bc-aws-378
31 | resource "aws_lb_target_group" "ecs" { 32 | name = "${var.project_name}-tg-ecs" 33 | port = 8080 34 | protocol = "HTTP" 35 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 36 | target_type = "ip" 37 | health_check { 38 | path = "/health" 39 | interval = 30 40 | timeout = 5 41 | healthy_threshold = 2 42 | unhealthy_threshold = 3 43 | matcher = "200" 44 | } 45 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-tg-ecs" } 46 | }

failure.message: Ensure that ALB redirects HTTP requests into HTTPS ones

Resource: aws_lb.internal File: /ecs.tf: 22-29 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-that-alb-redirects-http-requests-into-https-ones
22 | resource "aws_lb" "internal" { 23 | name = "${var.project_name}-alb-internal" 24 | internal = true 25 | load_balancer_type = "application" 26 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.alb.id] 27 | subnets = [aws_subnet.private_a.id, aws_subnet.private_b.id] 28 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-alb-internal" } 29 | }
